use_cases: Display user profile images with fallback to initials or placeholder text
Show user online/offline/busy/away status indicators on profile elements
Display user avatars in navigation menus or header sections
Render avatar groups with multiple user profile pictures
Use as part of larger user cards or comment sections
ai_summary: A composite Avatar component system built on Radix UI primitives with Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback, AvatarIndicator, and AvatarStatus sub-components. Features status variants (online, offline, busy, away) managed via class-variance-authority. Uses Tailwind CSS with cn utility for class merging. Designed for universal use across SaaS, fintech, e-commerce, and other platforms where user identity and presence indicators are needed.
